overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban architecture. The footage appears to be from a high-quality video game engine, showcasing wet reflective surfaces, volumetric fog, and detailed neon signage.

camera glances slightly left to observe passing vehicles and billboards

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The street is lined with illuminated billboards including a prominent purple portrait sign, while futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet multi-lane road. Street lamps cut through the heavy fog and rain, creating a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and towering buildings

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the yellow grid crosswalk to cross the intersection
camera pans upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and palm trees against the foggy sky
pauses briefly as a black sedan drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the towering buildings and neon signs, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection
distant figure walking on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: massive futuristic glass skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the fog
traffic signal showing green light for vehicles
yellow grid pattern painted on the street marking the pedestrian crosswalk
large billboard displaying text CAN'T FEEL in bright neon letters

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide urban intersection marked with yellow grid lines, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The camera pans up to take in the scale of the buildings while navigating around passing vehicles. Neon billboards including one reading CAN'T FEEL dominate the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk approaching an overpass with increasing pedestrian activity

events.description: approaching a group of pedestrians standing and walking on the sidewalk ahead
nearing the entrance to the covered overpass with LA HUESUDA signage visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the overpass, passing other pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
person carrying a glowing orange umbrella walking along the building front

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with LA HUESUDA text visible on the side
illuminated advertisements and signs on the building facade at street level
tiled concrete sidewalk with red and gray patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite side of the street on a tiled concrete sidewalk, approaching a large overpass structure labeled LA HUESUDA. The area has moderate pedestrian activity with people walking in opposing directions. Storefront advertisements line the right side while the street continues to be wet from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with wall-mounted neon advertisements

events.description: enters the darker covered area beneath the overpass, lighting shifts to artificial sources and neon wall ads
passing wall-mounted neon advertisements illuminating the tunnel walls with blue and orange light

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass beneath the LA HUESUDA overpass, moving toward the distant light at the tunnel exit

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure with umbrella walking ahead in the tunnel toward the camera
futuristic car driving through the underpass from behind and passing by

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the overpass with embedded lighting fixtures
series of illuminated advertisement panels lining the tunnel wall with various neon colors
bright neon sign reading SO STRONG IT BLOWS in red and blue letters
bright exit of the tunnel visible in the distance with fog and light streaming in

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban underpass beneath the LA HUESUDA overpass. The environment shifts to artificial lighting with neon advertisements lining the walls, including a prominent SO STRONG IT BLOWS sign. The tunnel is darker than the open street, with a silhouetted figure carrying an umbrella visible ahead and the bright exit visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, moving from open neon-lit streets into the enclosed shadows of an urban underpass. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk lined with glowing purple billboards and futuristic vehicles, where street lamps pierce through a heavy, moody fog. As the camera crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow grid lines, the view expands upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees beneath a dominant neon sign reading CAN'T FEEL. The scene then shifts to a tiled concrete sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, passing pedestrians and storefront advertisements while approaching a massive overpass labeled LA HUESUDA. Finally, the camera enters the covered underpass, where the open city light gives way to artificial neon advertisements and a darker tunnel atmosphere, following a silhouetted figure with an umbrella toward a bright exit in the distance.
